_comment: Phase 30 (GOV-08, D-15/D-16) conservative service denylist + sensitive-origin seed. deniedOrigins: services where automation is categorically prohibited (rendered non-enableable by the consent gate, checked BEFORE per-origin policy). sensitiveOrigins: services that force extra friction (Ask / confirm) even under Auto but are not necessarily hard-denied. This is a CONSERVATIVE category seed, NOT an aggressive broad blocklist, and is USER-EXTENSIBLE. Host patterns use a leading 'https://*.' subdomain-wildcard form: 'https://*.chase.com' matches any subdomain of chase.com (and the bare apex); 'https://*.gov' matches any host ending in '.gov'. A pattern with no '*' matches that exact origin. See docs/LEGAL.md for the policy rationale.
deniedReason: Automation prohibited for this service category (financial / government). See docs/LEGAL.md.
